signals.npcLine: Crypto tides turn; shadows grow thicker over neon skylines.
signals.questPulse: Market currents dip, stirring unrest in the data streams.
signals.worldFeed: Global crypto nodes flicker under pressure; many protocols shaky.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of a market contraction ripple through net hubs.

signals.npcLine: Chip tech glitches spike; system catchers report corrupted feeds.
signals.questPulse: Trace the source of strange signal noise disrupting circuits.
signals.worldFeed: Circuit board anomalies traced to rogue code fragments.
signals.clueEvent: Subroutines in CHIP networks malfunction; contagion risk rising.

signals.npcLine: Pengu signals rise in frequency; cold data flows intensify.
signals.questPulse: Decode icy transmissions before they vanish in black ice.
signals.worldFeed: Unusual package drops seen in icy node networks.
signals.clueEvent: Pengu token surges hint at hidden trade routes forming.

signals.npcLine: Rave pulses surge; underground rave circuits light up city grids.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate rave net to uncover black market data trails.
signals.worldFeed: Neon rave signals spike; digital chaos corridors widening.
signals.clueEvent: Rave token spike decodes into encrypted event invitations.

signals.npcLine: Fear haunts traders; whispers of collapse echo in data dens.
signals.questPulse: Build trust in shaky markets to stabilize fragile alliances.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment under ##; fear spreads like a virus in nets.
signals.clueEvent: Low confidence detected in trading algorithms; proceed with care.
